query.query_string: Valproic acid AND trigeminal nerve neoplasm

data.query: Valproic acid AND trigeminal nerve neoplasm

results.title: [Sturge-Weber syndrome: experience with 14 cases].
results.abstract: The objective of this study was to review the cases of Sturge-Weber syndrome (SWS) diagnosed and followed-up in our center over the last 25 year period in order to evaluate their clinical characteristics, evolution and therapeutical response.
